appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Dashboard' section with isolation rules, seeded data reference, API field naming convention (camelCase), and task type enum values
Documented that agent-browser built-in 'drag' command works reliably with dnd-kit (vs manual mouse operations which don't trigger PointerSensor)
Documented that loading state capture requires network delay simulation (API responds too fast locally) and error state capture requires clearing React Query cache via about:blank navigation

frictions.description: Duplicate project names in database cause ambiguous dropdown options (minor, pre-existing data issue)
Concurrent validators modifying shared database state during testing caused some validators to have reduced test data
frictions.resolution: Validators adapted by creating their own test data or testing with empty results

frictions.description: Agent filter dropdown shows raw UUIDs instead of human-readable agent names (UX improvement suggestion)
frictions.suggestion: Consider mapping agent IDs to names in the filter dropdown display

frictions.description: Toast messages auto-dismiss after 4 seconds, requiring chained screenshot/eval commands
frictions.resolution: Chained drag command with eval/screenshot in same shell invocation

frictions.description: dnd-kit PointerSensor requires 5px activation distance; manual mouse operations don't work; must use agent-browser built-in drag command
